headline: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq, S&P 500 Score Highs As Oil Falls Below $90 (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished in the black after a day of mixed trading Wednesday, as oil prices continued to fall amid hopes of a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran.  Among standouts, AppLovin bucked weakness among technology stocks and retook a key level.  The Dow rose 0.4%, while the S&P 500 edged into positive territory.

headline: Seagate CEO drops eye-opening message on exploding AI data demand
summary: Most people think of Artificial Intelligence (AI) as a computing story. Chips, GPUs, data centers. The hardware that processes the intelligence. Seagate CEO Dave Mosley wants investors to think about what comes after the processing. All that AI activity — every model trained, every inference ...

headline: Sandisk raised as Barclays says memory/storage ‘the most attractive vertical’
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays analyst Tom O’Malley upgraded Sandisk to Overweight in a note on Wednesday, lifting the stock’s price target to $2,300, arguing that the memory and storage sector is entering a fundamentally different phase driven by long-term contracts, tighter supply, and unprecedented pricing visibility.
